creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
It should be noted that upstream sets -O3 and -ffast-math by default (O3 gets overridden by O2 in ports framework)

I tested O3 and the only difference I noticed are that sha3 checksum caculations where are almost twice as fast on amd64 (hashwell), don't know if it matters in the end but if it does it port should have a toggle for optimization.
